headline: Ford Motor Company announced an anti-dilutive share repurchase program of up to 31.7 million shares to offset dilution from share-based compensation and convertible note settlements.
investor_impact: This is a standard corporate housekeeping measure that will prevent EPS drag from 2026 stock-based compensation and the upcoming convertible note settlement. It signals prudent capital management but does not represent a net-new return of capital to shareholders.
